_comment: LangLang experience configuration — single source of truth.

_guide.module_id: Matches the filename (module_0 → module_0.json). Used for logging only.
_guide.videos: Ordered list of res/raw file names (no extension) to play in sequence.
_guide.permission_gate: Requests RECORD_AUDIO after the video sequence plays.
_guide.speech_gate: User must speak 'display_prompt' correctly to advance.
_guide.expected_text: Lowercase, no punctuation — how the speech recogniser should hear it.
_guide.idle_video: Loops as a boomerang while the user is preparing to speak. Place a matching '<name>_rev.mp4' in res/raw for the boomerang reverse.
_guide.wrong_videos: Played in order when the user answers incorrectly. Wraps around if exhausted.
_guide.next_step_id: ID of the next step. Omit or set to null to end the experience.

steps._label: Step 1 — Scenes 1-3 + host question → first speech gate

speech_gate.display_prompt: Update this prompt to match your scene dialogue.
